title: Balanced review
subtitle: Praise plus limitation.
overview: Module: Practical Writing. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: Balanced reviews are more believable than only praise or only criticism.
平衡评价比只有赞美或只有批评更可信。
Useful frame: purpose, key detail, polite request, and next step.
实用框架：目的、关键细节、礼貌请求和下一步。
Write a balanced review of a course or service.
对一门课程或服务写一个平衡评价。
Overall, I liked the course because the examples were practical and easy to repeat. The only downside was that I wanted more listening practice at natural speed.
总体来说，我喜欢这门课，因为例子实用且容易重复。唯一的缺点是我希望有更多自然速度的听力练习。

items.en: Balanced reviews are more believable than only praise or only criticism.
items.zh: 平衡评价比只有赞美或只有批评更可信。

items.en: Useful frame: purpose, key detail, polite request, and next step.
items.zh: 实用框架：目的、关键细节、礼貌请求和下一步。

items.en: Overall, I liked the course because the examples were practical and easy to repeat. The only downside was that I wanted more listening practice at natural speed.
items.zh: 总体来说，我喜欢这门课，因为例子实用且容易重复。唯一的缺点是我希望有更多自然速度的听力练习。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Write a balanced review of a course or service.
lines.zh: 对一门课程或服务写一个平衡评价。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Overall, I liked the course because the examples were practical and easy to repeat. The only downside was that I wanted more listening practice at natural speed.
lines.zh: 总体来说，我喜欢这门课，因为例子实用且容易重复。唯一的缺点是我希望有更多自然速度的听力练习。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Write a balanced review of a course or service.
items.zh: 对一门课程或服务写一个平衡评价。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
